meaning: n.极端流于感伤的音乐,伤感主义
examples: The "Dragon Tattoo" duo say their icy, ominous score wasn't intended as a rebuke of symphonic schmaltz.
According to The Guardian's critic, the ballet's score features "house and trance, wild synths, romantic schmaltz and mercurial dissonances".
At first blush, opening number "Good Morning Baltimore" smacks of schmaltz.
